FirstInstallation.subtitle: The only app to manage all your school life in one place!
FirstInstallation.tos: By continuing, you accept the {{conditions}} and the {{privacy}}.

ServiceSelector.message: To begin with, what's your school service?

PronoteAuthSelector.message: What do you prefer to use to connect to Pronote?
PronoteAuthSelector.affiliation: Papillon is not affiliated with PRONOTE or Index Éducation. Your data remains securely on your device only.

PronoteGeolocation.message: Papillon needs your location to search for establishments
PronoteGeolocation.subtitle: Your location is needed to find nearby PRONOTE instances. It will be sent to PRONOTE and to the government's address api to find establishments. It is not stored.

PronoteManualLocation.message: In which city is your establishment located?
PronoteManualLocation.placeholder: Search for a city, a postal code...

PronoteQRCode.title: Connection to PRONOTE
PronoteQRCode.subtitle: Scan your school's QR Code to connect!

PronoteInstanceSelector.message: Here are the establishments I found!

alert.title: The {{name}} instance requires an ENT connection
alert.subtitle: You will be redirected to your ENT's login portal.

GenericLogin.title: Connection to {{name}}
GenericLogin.privacy: Papillon is not affiliated with {{name}}. {{name}}'s privacy policy applies.

SkolengoAuthSelector.message: What do you prefer to use to connect to Skolengo?
SkolengoAuthSelector.privacy: Papillon is not affiliated with Skolengo. Your data remains securely on your device only.

SkolengoInstanceSelector.message: Here are the establishments I found!

IdentityProviderSelector.title: Universities and others
